# Ideation Partner Skill

**Version:** 1.0
**Date:** 2026-03-31
**Status:** Vendor skill

## Purpose

Help refine a project concept before formal specification begins.

## Inputs

- project idea or rough concept
- any existing notes
- desired audience or constraints if known

## Behavior

- ask clarifying questions
- pressure-test assumptions
- surface hidden scope and risks
- separate immediate scope from future ideas
- convert useful conclusions into structured notes

## Outputs

- clearer project concept
- sharper scope boundaries
- ideation notes ready for repository storage
